productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Purple Wallets
description: Purple colour wallet with the shiny look of patent leather.  Small enough to keep safe in your bag, but stylish enough to carry in your hand as a fashion accessory.  We love the shine of imitation patent leather – it makes this simple wallet into an evening wear essential.Made of 100% polyurethane on the outside and 100% polyester lining for durabilityFour credit card slots plus one clear id card slotTwo open compartments and one larger slotOne compartment with a flap opening to keep your loose change.Press button fasteningLogo and studs in black decorating the frontCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
